title: Above the cloud
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xu6AGAfGWF0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Embark on a wondrous adventure in a fantastical world of floating islands, filled with awe and beauty!

- Diverse Island Worlds: Islands with varied biomes, from lush jungles to mysterious glaciers, await your exploration.
- Varied Challenging Structures: Traverse ancient ruins and perilous dungeons to unlock hidden secrets and treasures.
- Romantic Aerial Journeys: Pilot planes or airships, soaring through the sea of clouds, embracing the freedom and romance of flight.
- Rich Decorations: Craft your dream island haven with exquisite building materials and unique ornamental designs.
Set sail now and immerse yourself in this magical, adventure-filled skybound wonderland!

探索一個由漂浮空島構成的奇幻世界，開啟一場充滿驚奇與美感的冒險之旅！

- 多樣生態的空島世界：不同生態的空島，從繁茂的叢林到神秘的冰川，等待你來探索。
- 挑戰多變的結構：穿越古老遺跡、危險地牢，解鎖隱藏的秘密與寶藏。
- 浪漫的空中之旅：駕駛飛機或飛艇，翱翔於雲海之間，感受自由與浪漫的飛行體驗。
- 豐富的裝飾品：用精美的建築材料與獨特裝飾，打造屬於你的夢幻空島家園。
